State and Federal laws and regulations as well as by the HHA's internal policies. The 
orders must be signed and dated with the date of receipt by the registered nurse or 
qualified therapist (i.e., physical therapist, speech-language pathologist, occupational 
therapist, or medical social worker) responsible for furnishing or supervising the ordered
